name: Caribbean Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the cooked rice with mandolin-sliced oranges, crushed pineapple, red pepper, slivered almonds, grated coconut, sliced green onions, mango chutney, and ground ginger.
2. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring until all ingredients are well blended and heated through.
3. Serve with grilled or broiled shrimp.
